objective: Eliminate runtime validation failures for platform truth

domains.runtimeFailure: Timed out waiting for revenue dashboard detail in command center flow.
domains.rootCause: Flow asserted marketplace/revenue through stale command-detail path that failed when revenue panel crashed and command-center sequence changed.
domains.uiEntryPoint: Admin login -> Production Command Center -> section tabs (Security/Revenue/Marketplace/Enterprise).
domains.expectedBehavior: Full admin flow reaches security, revenue, marketplace, and enterprise surfaces.
domains.actualBehavior: Flow stopped at revenue detail wait and returned false completion token.
domains.fixRequired: Updated validator to strictly follow visible UI tabs and verify rendered surfaces by selectors.

domains.runtimeFailure: Validator timed out on outdated monetization selector path and later on create-message visibility.
domains.rootCause: Validator targeted indirect revenue-panel hook instead of marketplace dashboard CRUD flow; create message not guaranteed after auto-switch to My Listings.
domains.uiEntryPoint: Admin login -> Production Command Center -> Marketplace section.
domains.expectedBehavior: Marketplace dashboard mounts and supports create/edit/delete/apply operations.
domains.actualBehavior: Selector mismatch caused timeout and false fail despite reachable UI.
domains.fixRequired: Rewrote validator to execute real UI CRUD: create listing, edit title, delete listing, and check diagnostics.

domains.runtimeFailure: Revenue detail timeout and subsequent runtime crash path.
domains.rootCause: Revenue path blocked by monetization runtime exception in `analyzeRevenue()` using undefined `context`.
domains.uiEntryPoint: Admin login -> Production Command Center -> Revenue section.
domains.expectedBehavior: Revenue dashboard renders KPI cards and forecast panel with diagnostics.
domains.actualBehavior: Revenue panel failed to mount consistently under validator path.
domains.fixRequired: Patched `src/lib/revenue/monetizationAI.js` to initialize `context` in `analyzeRevenue`; kept validator UI-only.

domains.runtimeFailure: Previous validator failed in mixed static/runtime mode and command-center assumptions.
domains.rootCause: Used static checks and non-UI engine pathways; threat simulation did not guarantee card state change.
domains.uiEntryPoint: Admin login -> System workspace -> Sentinel Security Card.
domains.expectedBehavior: Threat simulation updates card level/active threat count and emits diagnostics.
domains.actualBehavior: Initial simulation path kept card green without deterministic event burst.
domains.fixRequired: Rewrote validator to seed threat events through persisted runtime data + UI event dispatch, then verify card level change + diagnostics.

domains.runtimeFailure: Timed out in prior script while relying on static file assertions and direct engine calls.
domains.rootCause: Validator mixed compile-time checks and runtime assumptions, causing brittle failures unrelated to visible panel behavior.
domains.uiEntryPoint: Admin login -> System workspace -> Sentinel Assistant panel.
domains.expectedBehavior: Panel renders executive summary, priorities, recommendations, and answers interactive prompt.
domains.actualBehavior: Legacy script failed before meaningful UI validation path completed.
domains.fixRequired: Rewrote to pure Playwright UI interactions with recommendation prompt + diagnostics verification.

domains.runtimeFailure: Timed out with outdated hero type option and heavy direct-engine static checks.
domains.rootCause: Validator selected unsupported option (`MOST_WATCHED`) in hero manager discovery enum and depended on direct runtime engine calls.
domains.uiEntryPoint: Normal hero stage + Admin login -> System workspace -> Hero Manager panel.
domains.expectedBehavior: Hero manager setting changes propagate to live hero mode/content.
domains.actualBehavior: Script failed before verifying UI effect due invalid select option path.
domains.fixRequired: Rewrote validator to UI-only flow, using supported option (`CONTINUE_WATCHING`) and validating hero mode/title/insight + diagnostics.

domains.rootCause: Revenue section render was blocked by monetization runtime error (`context is not defined`) and validator had brittle assumptions.
domains.uiEntryPoint: Admin login -> Production Command Center section tabs.
domains.expectedBehavior: All command-center sections render and diagnostics emit.
domains.fixRequired: Resolved monetization crash and hardened validator to focus on runtime section rendering + diagnostics.

domains.runtimeFailure: Timed out in prior run waiting for expected admin context panel chain.
domains.rootCause: Legacy sequence depended on fragile preconditions and direct engine hook checks.
domains.uiEntryPoint: Admin login -> System workspace -> Studio Appearance panel.
domains.expectedBehavior: Theme profile selection updates shell theme and persists in local storage.
domains.actualBehavior: Previous script failed before completing theme persistence checks.
domains.fixRequired: Retained runtime-only visibility/theme/persistence assertions and removed direct `window.__...` dependency.
